generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.example.org/base"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.org/dtdf-vocab"
instance VehicleStateDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ObjectTracksDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of object tracks"
]

instance Environment3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle's environment"
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated report of vehicle state data"
]

instance ACCDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Compute desired speed for adaptive cruise control based on lead vehicle distance",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for ACC",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiate emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time state display and reports",
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateDisplayInsight, ObjectTracksDisplayInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC logic executed remotely",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDesiredSpeedAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, ACCDisableAction, SpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance Environment3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D Visualization of environment",
    DTDFVocab:provides Environment3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report Generation for vehicle state data",
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReportInsight
]

instance DBSCANEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering enabler",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object tracking enabler using Kalman filter",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic enabler",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, Environment3DVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing time-series vehicle state data",
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance HokuyoLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLidarPointCloud
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception",
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraDepthData
]

instance VedderESCSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for speed data collection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VedderESCSpeedData
]

instance HokuyoLidarPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLidar
]

instance IntelDepthCameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VedderESCSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderESCSpeedSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarPointCloud,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel D435i",
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDepthCameraDepthData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data from Vedder ESC",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VedderESCSpeedData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for controlling vehicle direction"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX for onboard processing"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for onboard processing"
]

instance CloudDTEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud-based Digital Twin Entity for remote computation offloading"
]

instance UserInterfaceSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface system for 3D visualization and remote management"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX, NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller",
    base:contains HokuyoLidar, IntelDepthCamera, VedderESCSpeedSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, CloudDTEntity, UserInterfaceSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering angle adjustments from the Digital Twin Entity to the vehicle's motor and steering servo via ROS2, maintaining ≤100 ms end-to-end latency"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination between distributed components"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (visualization/control), and Cross-System Data Translation FE, interconnected via ROS2 within vehicle and Wi-Fi for cloud communication"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase (as designed) for ADAS development and operation phase (as operated) for real-time monitoring and optimization, per automotive DT applications in design validation and operational health monitoring"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for intra-vehicle communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between vehicle and cloud-based DT Entity, with data serialization and translation via Data Translation FE"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity hosted in cloud; User Entity accessible via web-based interface; Data Storage in external SQL database"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework; ACC implementation based on ISO 15622 standard for performance class I"
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requiring ≤100 ms end-to-end latency and 100 ms clock synchronization to ensure real-time control; no specific cybersecurity protocols detailed"
]
